title: Allow Disconnect
description: Adds a disconnect button to server loading screens so when u r stuck on a loading screen you can use the button to disconnect from the server
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6231055c2e8036a16adcd8baffa2750087e90c72_0.webp)

Stuck in a loading terrain screen again? Fear no more, allow disconnect will allow you to exit that screen!

### Features:
 - Adds a button called disconnect to every server pause screen (like downloading terrain)
- Allows you to disconnect from server while downloading terrain or getting stuck on one of those pause pages.
